visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young woman with long, wavy dark hair and a beige top, positioned in the center against a cream-colored bedroom background with an ornate white headboard. She gestures expressively with her hands as text overlays and small icons appear around her. (2) The scene shifts to a closer shot of the woman holding a pair of blue and white slippers. She manipulates them to show their flexibility while maintaining eye contact with the lens. Graphic icons of sandals appear at the bottom. (3) The visual transitions to include a split-screen effect where a photo of a traditional Korean breakfast spread with many small dishes is displayed below the woman, who continues to gesture and speak from the top half of the frame. (4) The woman is now seen in a car interior, looking directly into a handheld camera as if filming a selfie. The lighting is bright and natural, coming from the car windows. (5) Back in the bedroom, she holds up a white Sulwhasoo skincare bottle, pointing at the label. Cutaway shots show the product being pumped onto a hand and then applied to her face in close-up. (6) A split-screen comparison shows a 'Before' face with a black bar over the eyes and an 'After' face that appears brighter and more moisturized. (7) The final phase shows the woman back in her initial position, holding the product and waving goodbye to the camera while various promotional text boxes appear.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: (來台灣8年). [Variety]: 韓國人回不去了!. (2) [Subtitle]: 被台化的3種習慣. (3) [Subtitle]: 對 我搬家了. (4) [Subtitle]: 1. 愛上拖鞋. (5) [Subtitle]: 2. 早上不用煮菜. (6) [Subtitle]: 因為台灣有「早餐店」. (7) [Subtitle]: 小菜也至少會有6~7種. (8) [Subtitle]: 3. 化妝時間減少!. (9) [Subtitle]: 潤娥同款前導精華. [Logo]: Sulwhasoo. (10) [Subtitle]: 雪花秀 潤燥養膚精華. (11) [Subtitle]: 洗臉後第1步. (12) [Subtitle]: 5天後膚況升級. (13) [Slogan]: $200元14天體驗組.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light beige/pinkish ribbed top with a lace-up detail.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primarily a bedroom with a white bed frame and wallpaper; briefly inside a car with blurred street views; includes graphical overlays of food and skincare bottles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, female voice speaking Mandarin with an enthusiastic tone, accompanied by an upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop track. A 'whoosh' sound effect marks the transition between introductory sentences. (2) A distinct 'pop' sound effect occurs as she mentions her first point about slippers. The background music maintains a consistent beat. (3) As the discussion shifts to Korean food, the speaker's pitch remains high and engaging, with brief pauses for emphasis. The music continues without interruption. (4) A 'ding' or bell-like sound effect is heard when the Sulwhasoo bottle is visually introduced, adding a bright, high-frequency accent to the audio. (5) During the skincare application demonstration, subtle liquid movement or bottle-handling sounds are present but largely masked by the dominant BGM and clear narration. (6) The final phase features a bright 'sparkle' sound effect as the speaker concludes her recommendation, ending with a cheerful goodbye and the music fading out quickly after the last word.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> 3 Cultural Habits -> Product Introduction -> Efficacy Evidence -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video utilizes a lifestyle vlog format to share the creator's personal experience as a Korean living in Taiwan, focusing on three habits she has adopted. This relatable storytelling serves as a lead-in to promote a specific skincare product (Sulwhasoo), highlighting its benefits for the local climate and providing a discount offer to drive consumer action.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product, explanation of benefits, demonstration of use, and a specific promotional price offer ($200 TWD trial set).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends cross-cultural storytelling with commercial promotion. The high density of text overlays and sound effects is typical of short-form social media content designed for high engagement.
